title: citronella incarum
intro: Citronella incarum, also known as lemongrass citronella, is a type of plant native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of citronella incarum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, as well as its ability to repel insects. Citronella incarum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
